cache_manifest.subsampling: NONE -- every usable sample cached; cache-backed numbers are full-sample numbers

monte_carlo_resolution.language_guard: Monte Carlo resolution of the released posterior samples ONLY. These fractions are NOT coverage against nominal 68%/95% levels: the bootstrap encodes no detector-noise, calibration, waveform or population uncertainty. Supported claim: the ~1 deg discrepancy greatly exceeds finite-sample Monte Carlo error.

signed_residual.note: catalog-specific values are reported because the effect is NOT uniform -- strongest in the training catalog, weakest in the newest. Pooling all events into one sign test overstates it.

threshold_sensitivity.note: axr>=3 is the locked primary score; the curve error is monotone and smooth across thresholds, so the primary score is not threshold-tuned.
